items.title: Token scale under-documents --breakpoint-xl
items.body: The --breakpoint-xl token in DESIGN-TOKENS is referenced but not typed. Add a concrete rem value so consumers do not drift.
items.author: adversarial-audit

items.title: Review page lacks desktop screenshot baseline
items.body: Playwright spec is declared but no baseline PNG is committed. Generate and commit baseline at 1440x900.
items.author: adversarial-audit

items.title: FeedbackList missing aria-busy on loading
items.body: Verify that FeedbackList surfaces aria-busy=true while the fetch is in-flight per state coverage grid §7.5.
items.author: adversarial-audit

items.title: Mobile sheet escape key close missing
items.body: Pressing Escape while the sheet is open does not close it. Required for WCAG 2.1.2.
items.author: qa-reviewer

items.title: Annotation pin shows 3-decimal percentage
items.body: Coordinates should round to 2 decimals for deterministic snapshots.
items.author: design-reviewer

items.title: Sidebar width jitters at 1280px
items.body: Resize browser through 1280px and the sidebar flickers between 20rem and 24rem. Pin to CSS var boundary.
items.author: jason

items.title: Adopt review-agent copy missing emoji marker
items.body: Aligns surface with adversarial convention. See FeedbackOriginIcon §2.
items.author: feedback-assessor

items.title: Stage strip sticky overlap with sidebar
items.body: At xl breakpoint the stage strip scrolls under the sidebar sticky column. z-index bump needed.
items.author: adversarial-audit

items.title: Footer bar Approve button focus ring is wrong variant
items.body: Use focusRingVariantClasses.approve, not the canonical teal ring. Contrast fails on success color.
items.author: adversarial-audit

items.title: FAB label should be aria-labelledby not aria-label
items.body: External review screen uses aria-labelledby referencing the visible sheet title.
items.author: jason

items.title: External PR annotation: add sr-only status label
items.body: PR reviewer flagged that the status dot is visual-only. Pair with sr-only text.
items.author: external-reviewer

items.title: External MR annotation: typing scale regression
items.body: MR flagged text-[10px] on counts. Replaced with token-compliant text-xs.
items.author: mr-reviewer

items.title: Token hash drift on feedback cluster
items.body: Cluster token hash changed without snapshot update. Re-run verify-tokens.
items.author: adversarial-audit

items.title: Inline comment unwrap leaves empty spans
items.body: DOM normalize() call missing after unwrap path. Verified fix.
items.author: qa-reviewer

items.title: External PR: license header missing on new file
items.body: Closed — added the project header per contribution doc.
items.author: external-reviewer

items.title: Agent probe: missing ResizeObserver polyfill in tests
items.body: Closed — already shipped in tests/setup.ts.
items.author: feedback-assessor

items.title: Reject: virtualization threshold should be 25
items.body: Requester wanted 25 items threshold; unit spec explicitly calls 50. Keep 50.
items.author: jason

items.title: Reject: swap teal for purple accent
items.body: Brand color stays teal per DESIGN-TOKENS §1.2. Out of scope.
items.author: design-reviewer

items.title: Reject: external PR asked for Cypress instead of Playwright
items.body: Repo standard is Playwright. Documented in tactical plan §4.
items.author: external-reviewer

items.title: Reject: external MR requested monorepo restructure
items.body: Scope too large for this intent. Deferred to a separate intent.
items.author: mr-reviewer
